title: Fix admin access control to allow authenticated owner to access admin panel

requirements.text: Fix the backend owner principal verification in backend/main.mo to correctly authenticate the owner with principal '7cho6-twidd-xljev-okmzv-oebuv-llwo6-5tmzy-3n3pb-4nhg5-54713-aae' and grant admin access by ensuring isCallerAdmin returns true for this principal
acceptanceCriteria: The backend isCallerAdmin method returns true when called by principal '7cho6-twidd-xljev-okmzv-oebuv-llwo6-5tmzy-3n3pb-4nhg5-54713-aae'
The admin panel is accessible to the authenticated owner without showing 'Access Denied'
Backend logs confirm the principal comparison succeeds for the owner

requirements.text: Verify the owner principal initialization logic in backend/main.mo correctly stores and compares the owner principal '7cho6-twidd-xljev-okmzv-oebuv-llwo6-5tmzy-3n3pb-4nhg5-54713-aae' during canister deployment and authentication checks
acceptanceCriteria: The owner principal is correctly initialized and stored in the backend state
Principal comparison logic correctly identifies the owner

requirements.text: Add comprehensive backend logging in the isCallerAdmin method to output the caller's principal text representation, the stored owner principal text representation, and the boolean comparison result to diagnose why authentication is failing for the authenticated owner
acceptanceCriteria: Backend logs show the caller principal in text format when isCallerAdmin is called
Backend logs show the stored owner principal in text format
Backend logs show the result of the principal comparison (true/false)
Logs are visible in the canister console for debugging

requirements.text: Update the frontend App.tsx admin route protection to display the exact principal received from the backend isCallerAdmin check in the access denied message for debugging purposes
acceptanceCriteria: The access denied message includes the authenticated user's principal ID
The debug info is clearly visible to help diagnose authentication issues
The message formatting matches the screenshot layout

constraints: Do not modify the Internet Identity authentication flow
Preserve existing admin panel functionality and UI
Do not change the single-actor backend architecture
Keep all console logging for debugging until the issue is resolved
nonGoals: Adding role-based access control beyond owner/user distinction
Changing the admin panel UI design
Modifying the admin token URL parameter extraction logic
